description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house surrounded by mature trees and enclosed by a wooden fence. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, giving it a modern yet substantial appearance. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps, a small porch, and decorative shrubs. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a mix of rectangular and square shapes, and some larger picture windows visible. The property includes a wide driveway leading to a garage, and the backyard appears to have a pool area partially visible through the trees. The landscaping is lush, with several large trees providing shade and privacy around the house.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a wide driveway, and mature trees surrounding the property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and decorative landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage extension, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by large trees, with glimpses of the backyard and a pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof sections, additional windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small porch, and decorative shrubs; simple door design with minimal overhang.
